notes: Released October 25 2001; end of extended support April 8 2014; combined consumer (Win 9x line) and enterprise (NT/2000) architectures
Enterprise predecessor to XP; stability and speed referenced as XP baseline benchmark
Early Wi-Fi security protocol referenced in XP wireless setup; deprecated due to severe vulnerabilities; replaced by WPA/WPA2
802.11b wireless LAN hardware tested during XP upgrade; referenced for driver compatibility challenges
Audio/visual digital media capability highlighted as key XP consumer feature
